hi.question: सरल करें: 48 / 6 + 8 × 2 - 5
hi.explanation: BODMAS का उपयोग करते हुए: 48/6 = 8, 8 × 2 = 16, इसलिए 8 + 16 - 5 = 19।

en.question: Find the value of: square root of (0.09 + 0.16)
Simplify: 1/2 of 2/3 of 3/4 of 4/5 of 100
en.explanation: Multiply all fractions: 1/2 x 2/3 x 3/4 x 4/5 = 1/5. So 1/5 of 100 = 20.
